name: golang-golang-x-crypto-dev
title: golang-golang-x-crypto-dev
description:
Supplementary Go cryptography libraries
This package contains cryptographic algorithms and protocols not packaged in
the main Go distribution, such as:
.
- blowfish
- nacl
- openpgp
- otr
- sha3
- ssh
.
and many others.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-crypto-dev because Supplementary Go cryptography libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-crypto-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-crypto-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-crypto-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
